title: Hand Builder
subtitle: Recreate a hand (from a video or notes) in a few clicks — position, stacks and bets in bb — then analyze.

import.tip: Load a .txt hand history to keep adding hands where you left off
import.error: Invalid file — use a PokerStars hand history (with "PokerStars Hand #…").

setup.clickHero: click the ⭐ to set the hero
setup.confirmResize: Changing the table size rebuilds the players and clears the current hand. Continue?
setup.confirmRemove: Changing the table's players clears the current hand. Continue?

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.note: Metadata only to generate the PokerStars-format hand history — it doesn't affect the spot analysis. 1bb = 100 chips.

actions.title: Actions
actions.undoTip: Undo the last step (card, action, next hand, load…)
actions.confirmClear: Clear the current hand? Table and config stay.

selectBoard.flop: Select the 3 flop cards below to continue.
selectBoard.turn: Select the turn card below to continue.
selectBoard.river: Select the river card below to continue.

actions.markWinnerHint: Mark the winner below. Then start the next hand (button rotates, stacks update).
actions.handDoneHint: Pot and winner detected automatically. Click Next hand (at showdown, confirm the winner under Result).
actions.heroFoldedHint: The hero folded — the rest doesn't affect the analysis. Finish with the villains folding (the last aggressor takes the pot).
actions.handOver: Hand over (or only 1 active player). Advance the board or mark the winner.
actions.szPotFracTip: Bet as a fraction of the pot

preview.title: Hand History
preview.placeholder: (choose the table, the hero cards and log the actions to see the HH live)
preview.buildTip: Each "Next hand" adds the hand to the tournament file. When done, export .txt or analyze all of it.
preview.analyzeError: Couldn't analyze — check the hand and try again.
